seoTitle: San Bernardino City Unified Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks, PDF & ICS
seoDescription: View the SBCUSD Calendar 2026-2027 with school holidays, Aug 3 first day, Jun 3 last day, Winter Recess, Spring Break, printable PDF and Google Calendar download.
calendarNotes: San Bernardino City Unified starts the 2026-2027 traditional school year on August 3, 2026 as a minimum day. The last day of school and graduation date is June 3, 2027. Thanksgiving Recess runs November 23-27, Winter Recess runs December 21-January 8, and Spring Break runs March 22-April 2.

calendarFaqs.q: When does San Bernardino City Unified start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: SBCUSD starts school on Monday, August 3, 2026. The calendar marks it as a minimum day.

calendarFaqs.q: When is SBCUSD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, April 2, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for SBCUSD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school and graduation date is Thursday, June 3, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: What days are off school for SBCUSD in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Major SBCUSD days off school include Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Recess, Spring Break, Labor Day, Veterans Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Lincoln's Birthday observed, Presidents' Day observed, Memorial Day, teacher work days, professional development days, and student non-attendance days.

calendarFaqs.q: Does SBCUSD have school on holidays?
calendarFaqs.a: SBCUSD students do not attend school on districtwide holidays listed on the official calendar. Families should still check the official calendar and campus notices because some teacher work days, minimum days, and conference dates are not the same as major holidays.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the SBCUSD calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: The official SBCUSD 2026-2027 traditional calendar PDF is linked from this page, and families can also download the MySchoolDates calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in the SBCUSD 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The SBCUSD 2026-2027 traditional calendar includes 180 instructional days for students.

customSections.label: SBCUSD Days Off School 2026-2027
customSections.content: Parents often search for SBCUSD days off school when planning childcare, appointments, and family activities. Major no-school periods include district holidays, Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Recess, Spring Break, teacher work days, professional development days, and student non-attendance days.

groups.label: Main no-school categories
items: Teacher work days and professional development days may affect student attendance.
Elementary parent-teacher conference dates can affect family scheduling even when they are not major school breaks.

customSections.label: SBCUSD Calendar Changes Compared With 2025-2026
customSections.content: Families comparing SBCUSD calendar changes can use this summary to see how the 2026-2027 traditional calendar differs from the previous school year.

groups.label: 2025-2026 vs 2026-2027
items: First day: August 4, 2025 in 2025-2026; August 3, 2026 in 2026-2027.
Thanksgiving Recess: November 24-28, 2025 in 2025-2026; November 23-27, 2026 in 2026-2027.
Winter Recess: December 22, 2025-January 9, 2026 in 2025-2026; December 21, 2026-January 8, 2027 in 2026-2027.
Spring Break: March 23-April 3, 2026 in 2025-2026; March 22-April 2, 2027 in 2026-2027.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 3, 2026 and is marked as a minimum day.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: SBCUSD lists a two-week Spring Break for 2026-2027.

yearNumbers.label: Alternate Calendar
yearNumbers.detail: A separate Middle College High School calendar is available for 2026-2027.

events.name: Middle/High School Teacher Work Day/Non-Student Day
Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Day
